description.value: Price 6,160 gp; Slot armor; CL 4th; Weight 15 lbs.; Aura faint transmutation DESCRIPTION This formfitting black +1 leather features eight ridged support ribs along the back. On command, the arachnid harness sprouts eight enormous spidery legs from these ribs. Additionally, while the legs are deployed, the armorâs wearer doesnât lose her Dexterity bonus to AC while climbing, and need not succeed at a Climb check to avoid falling if she takes damage while climbing.
